description: A Computer Network Architect has provided a new hierarchical campus network design. A topology specification has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/network_dependency_spec.txt. Review the document, add the four specified network devices to OpManager's inventory, and configure the required parent-child dependency relationships so that root cause analysis (RCA) works correctly. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123). Note: The devices use private/non-routable IPs, so it is expected they may show as 'down' or 'not responding'. Focus on getting the inventory entries and dependency relationships saved.
